steps.text: Hello! I am your AI Guide. I will guide you through each step of the experiment. Please follow the instructions carefully and perform the actions as directed. Before we begin, let us familiarize ourselves with the simulation interface. To start, click on the start walkthrough

The interface walkthrough is now complete. You are now ready to perform the experiment. You may either click the Auto Connect button to make the circuit connections automatically or connect the circuit manually by following the highlighted terminals. Let's begin with the first connection.
steps.audio: The interface walkthrough is now complete.wav

steps.text: Click and drag the wire from terminal 1 and drop it on terminal 23.
Let's move on to the next connection. Connect terminal 2 to terminal 24.
Connect terminal 3 to terminal 25.
Connect terminal 4 to terminal 26.
Connect terminal 5 to terminal 25.
Connect terminal 6 to terminal 9.
Connect terminal 6 to terminal 10.
Connect terminal 7 to terminal 18.
Connect terminal 8 to terminal 11.
Connect terminal 11 to terminal 13.
Connect terminal 13 to terminal 15.
Connect terminal 12 to terminal 17.
Connect terminal 18 to terminal 20.
Connect terminal 14 to terminal 19.
Connect terminal 16 to terminal 21.
Connect terminal 20 to terminal 22.
Connect terminal 26 to terminal 7.
All connections are completed. Click on the Check button to verify the connections.
This connection is wrong.
Some connections are wrong.
Please make the required connections as per the given instructions.
Autoconnect completed. Click on the check button to verify the connections.
Make and check the connections before turning ON the MCB.
Ensure that the MCB is switched ON before switching ON the autotransformer.
Connections Verified successfully. Now turn ON the MCB by clicking the MCB lever.
MCB has been turned ON. Now, click the power button of the autotransformer.
Autotransformer is now ON. Next, click on the autotransformer knob to set the desired voltage.

The voltage has been set to 24 V to ensure safe operation of the RLC circuit experiment. The readings are now displayed on the voltmeter, ammeter, and wattmeter. Now, click on the Add button to add the readings to the observation table.

Readings added successfully. Now, calculate the required circuit parameters using the measured readings and the provided formulas. Once you have entered the calculated values, click the Verify button to compare your calculated values with the evaluated values.
The readings are already added to the table. Calculate the required circuit parameters and click the verify button to verify them.
steps.audio: After taking the readings Add click.wav

steps.text: Theoretical calculations verified successfully. All entered values are correct. Your simulation is now complete. You may view the report by clicking on the generate report button.
Please enter all the calculated values and verify them.
Please enter the required calculated value and verify it.
Verification failed. The highlighted values are incorrect. Please recheck your calculations and verify again.
Verification failed. The highlighted value is incorrect. Please review your calculation and verify again.
Your report has been generated successfully. Click OK to view your report.
The simulation has been reset. You can start again.
Opening the print dialog.
